        "contents": "// 代理选择 Hook\nexport const useProxySelection = (options: ProxySelectionOptions = {}) =\u003e {\n  const { current, patchCurrent } = useProfiles();\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n\n  const { onSuccess, onError, enableConnectionCleanup = true } = options;\n\n  // 缓存\n  const config = useMemo(\n    () =\u003e ({\n      autoCloseConnection: verge?.auto_close_connection ?? false,\n      enableConnectionCleanup,\n    }),\n    [verge?.auto_close_connection, enableConnectionCleanup],\n  );\n\n  // 切换节点：先等核心与 profile 同步完成，再刷新代理列表，避免过早刷新拿到旧 now 导致界面「选不上」\n  const changeProxy = useCallback(\n    async (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n      const timestamp = Date.now();\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 代理切换: ${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;);\n      console.log(\"=== [ProxySelection] 开始切换 ===\", {\n        时间戳: timestamp,\n        组名: groupName,\n        目标节点: proxyName,\n        之前节点: previousProxy ?? \"(无)\",\n        \"当前 profile.selected\": current?.selected ?? [],\n      });\n      \n      // 标记手动选择节点，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\n\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e\n;\n    }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \nconst getDisplayNowForGroup = \n(\n      group: { name: string; now?: string | null },\n      _useNameAsLabel?: boolean,\n    ): string =\u003e {\n\n    },\n    [selectedByGroup],\n  );\n\n  // Selector / URLTest / Fallback 组且 profile 的 current.selected 与 core 当前 now 一致时显示「手动选择」\n  const getManualSelectionForGroup = useCallback(\n    (groupName: string): string | undefined =\u003e {\n      const group = groups?.find(\n        (g: { name: string; type: string }) =\u003e g.name === groupName,\n      );\n      const typeLower = group?.type?.toLowerCase();\n      const entry = (current?.selected ?? []).find((s) =\u003e s.name === groupName);\n      const profileNow = entry?.now;\n      const coreNow = selectedByGroup.get(groupName);\n      const shouldShow = coreNow === profileNow \u0026\u0026 profileNow != null;\n      const result = shouldShow ? profileNow : undefined;\n\n      // 调试：每次判断图钉都打印完整信息\n      if ([\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(typeLower ?? \"\")) {\n        console.log(\"[ManualPin] 图钉判断\", {\n          组名: groupName,\n          组类型: group?.type,\n          \"profile.selected 里该组的 now\": profileNow ?? \"(无)\",\n          \"核心返回的 now\": coreNow ?? \"(无)\",\n          \"两者是否相等\": coreNow === profileNow,\n          \"profileNow 非空\": profileNow != null,\n          \"最终结果(显示图钉的节点名)\": result ?? \"(不显示)\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      if (\n        !group ||\n        ![\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(typeLower ?? \"\")\n      )\n        return undefined;\n      if (profileNow == null) return undefined;\n      return coreNow === profileNow ? profileNow : undefined;\n    },\n    [groups, current?.selected, selectedByGroup],\n  );\n\n  const availableGroups = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!groups) return [];\n    // 在链式代理模式下，仅显示支持选择节点的 Selector 代理组\n    return isChainMode\n      ? groups.filter((g: any) =\u003e g.type === \"Selector\")\n      : groups;\n  }, [groups, isChainMode]);\n\n  const defaultRuleGroup = useMemo\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const CurrentProxyCard = \nconst checkCurrentProxyDelay = \nasync (override?: {\n      groupName: string;\n      proxyName: string;\n      proxyRecord: any;\n    }) =\u003e {\n\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    [\n      isDirectMode,\n      refreshProxy,\n      state.proxyData.records,\n      state.selection.group,\n      state.selection.proxy,\n      sortType,\n      setDelaySortRefresh,\n      currentProfile?.selected,\n    ],\n  );\n\n  // 处理代理节点变更\n  const handleProxyChange = useCallback(\n    (event: SelectChangeEvent\u003cstring\u003e) =\u003e {\n      if (isDirectMode) return;\n\n      const newProxy = event.target.value;\n      const currentGroup = state.selection.group;\n      const previousProxy = state.selection.proxy;\n\n      debouncedSetState((prev: ProxyState) =\u003e ({\n        ...prev,\n        selection: {\n          ...prev.selection,\n          proxy: newProxy,\n        },\n        displayProxy: prev.proxyData.records[newProxy] || null,\n      }));\n\n      if (!isGlobalMode \u0026\u0026 !isDirectMode) {\n        writeProfileScopedItem(STORAGE_KEY_PROXY, newProxy);\n      }\n\n      const skipConfigSave = isGlobalMode || isDirectMode;\n      handleSelectChange(currentGroup, previousProxy, skipConfigSave)(event);\n\n      // 手动切换节点后立即检测新节点延迟，以显示最新速度\n      const newProxyRecord = state.proxyData.records?.[newProxy] ??       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \nconst handleConnect = async () =\u003e {\n\n    try {\n      // 第一步：保存链式代理配置\n      const chainProxies = proxyChain.map((node) =\u003e node.name);\n      debugLog(\"Saving chain config:\", chainProxies);\n      await updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(chainProxies);\n      debugLog(\"Chain configuration saved successfully\");\n\n      // 第二步：连接到代理链的最后一个节点\n      const lastNode = proxyChain[proxyChain.length - 1];\n      debugLog(&#96;Connecting to proxy chain, last node: ${lastNode.name}&#96;);\n\n      // 根据模式确定使用的代理组名称\n      if (mode !== \"global\" \u0026\u0026 !selectedGroup) {\n        throw new Error(\"规则模式下必须选择代理组\");\n      }\n\n      const targetGroup = mode === \"global\" ? \"GLOBAL\" : selectedGroup;\n\n      markManualProxySelectionStarted();\n      await selectNodeForGroup(targetGroup || \"GLOBAL\", lastNode.name);\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-group\", targetGroup || \"GLOBAL\");\n      localStorage.setItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\", lastNode.name);\n\n      // 刷新代理信息以更新连接状态\n      refreshProxy();\n      debugLog(\"Successfully connected to proxy chain\");\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Failed to connect to proxy chain:\", error);\n      alert(t(\"proxies.page.chain.connectFailed\") || \"连接链式代理失败\");\n    } finally {\n      setIsConnecting(false);\n    }\n  }, [\n    proxyChain,\n    isConnected,\n    t,\n    refreshProxy,\n    mode,\n    selectedGroup,\n    onUpdateChain,\n  ]);\n\n  const proxyChainRef = useRef(proxyChain);\n  const onUpdateChainRef = useRef(onUpdateChain);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    proxyChainRef.current = proxyChain;\n    onUpdateChainRef.current = onUpdateChain;\n  }, [proxyChain, onUpdateChain]);\n\n  // 处理链式代理配置数据\n  useEffect\n\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (s *Selector) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error) {\n\tall := []string{}\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tall = append(all, proxy.Name())\n\t}\n\t// When testurl is the default value\n\t// do not append a value to ensure that the web dashboard follows the settings of the dashboard\n\tvar url string\n\tif s.testUrl != C.DefaultTestURL {\n\t\turl = s.testUrl\n\t}\n\n\treturn json.Marshal(map[string]any{\n\t\t\"type\":    s.Type().String(),\n\t\t\"now\":     s.Now(),\n\t\t\"all\":     all,\n\t\t\"testUrl\": url,\n\t\t\"hidden\":  s.Hidden,\n\t\t\"icon\":    s.Icon,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Now() string {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(false).Name()\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar selectedProxy C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range s.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tselectedProxy = proxy\n\t\t\ts.selected = name\n\t\t\ts.manualSelected = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif selectedProxy == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 异步测速：手动选择的节点在后台测速，不阻塞返回（与安卓端体验对齐）\n\tif s.selectedTimeout \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 s.testUrl != \"\" {\n\t\tgo func() {\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(s.selectedTimeout))\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](s.expectedStatus)\n\t\t\t_, _ = selectedProxy.URLTest(ctx, s.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\t\t}()\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Selector) ForceSet(name string) {\n\ts.selected = name\n\ts.manualSelected = true\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (s *Selector) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn s.manualSelected\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection resets selection to the first proxy so no node is \"manually selected\".\nfunc (s *Selector) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tproxies := s.GetProxies(false)\n\tif len(proxies) \u003e 0 {\n\t\ts.selected = proxies[0].Name()\n\t}\n\ts.manualSelected = false\n}\n\n// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter\nfunc (s *Selector) Unwrap(metadata *C.Metadata, touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\treturn s.selectedProxy(touch)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error {\n\tvar p C.Proxy\n\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\tif proxy.Name() == name {\n\t\t\tp = proxy\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"proxy not exist\")\n\t}\n\n\t// 保存上一次的手动选择，用于健康检测失败时回滚\n\tif f.selected != \"\" \u0026\u0026 f.selected != name {\n\t\tf.previousSelected = f.selected\n\t}\n\n\t// 立即切换到用户选择的节点\n\tf.selected = name\n\n\t// 异步健康检测：使用 selectedTimeout（手动选择专用超时）\n\tgo func() {\n\t\ttimeoutMs := f.selectedTimeout\n\t\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\ttimeoutMs = f.TestTimeout\n\t\t}\n\t\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t\t}\n\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Millisecond*time.Duration(timeoutMs))\n\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\texpectedStatus, _ := utils.NewUnsignedRanges[uint16](f.expectedStatus)\n\t\t_, err := p.URLTest(ctx, f.testUrl, expectedStatus)\n\n\t\t// 健康检测失败：回滚到上一次选择的节点或清空（使用 fallback 自动选择）\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tif f.selected == name { // 确保没有被其他操作修改\n\t\t\t\tif f.previousSelected != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t// 检查上一次选择的节点是否仍然可用\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, proxy := range f.GetProxies(false) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.previousSelected {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = f.previousSelected\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\" // 上一个也不可用，使用 fallback 自动选择\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tf.selected = \"\" // 没有上一次选择，使用 fallback 自动选择\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) ForceSet(name string) {\n\tf.selected = name\n}\n\n// NowIsManual implements NowIsManualAble.\nfunc (f *Fallback) NowIsManual() bool {\n\treturn f.selected != \"\"\n}\n\n// ClearManualSelection clears the fixed selected node so the group auto-picks first alive.\nfunc (f *Fallback) ClearManualSelection() {\n\tf.selected = \"\"\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func QueryProxyGroup(name string, sortMode SortMode, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp) *ProxyGroup {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", name)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Query group &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tproxies := convertProxies(g.Proxies(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\t// \tproxies := collectProviders(g.Providers(), uiSubtitlePattern)\n\n\tswitch sortMode {\n\tcase Title:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn strings.Compare(a.Title, b.Title) \u003c 0\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Delay:\n\t\twrapper := \u0026sortableProxyList{\n\t\t\tlist: proxies,\n\t\t\tless: func(a, b *Proxy) bool {\n\t\t\t\treturn a.Delay \u003c b.Delay\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsort.Sort(wrapper)\n\tcase Default:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\n\tnowIsManual := false\n\tif manualable, ok := g.(outboundgroup.NowIsManualAble); ok {\n\t\tnowIsManual = manualable.NowIsManual()\n\t}\n\n\treturn \u0026ProxyGroup{\n\t\tType:        g.Type().String(),\n\t\tNow:         g.Now(),\n\t\tNowIsManual: nowIsManual,\n\t\tProxies:     proxies,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc PatchSelector(selector, name string) bool {\n\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[selector]\n\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: not found\", selector)\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := g.(outboundgroup.SelectAble)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", selector, p.Type().String())\n\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.Set(name); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Patch selector &#96;%s&#96;: %s\", selector, err.Error())\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Infoln(\"Patch selector %s -\u003e %s\", selector, name)\n\n\tcloseConnByGroup(selector)\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc convertProxies(proxies []C.Proxy, uiSubtitlePattern *regexp2.Regexp)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.github.kr328.clash.design.component\n\nimport android.graphics.Color\nimport android.graphics.Paint\nimport android.graphics.Path\nimport android.graphics.Rect\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.core.model.Proxy\nimport com.github.kr328.clash.design.model.ProxyState\nimport kotlin.math.absoluteValue\nimport kotlin.math.max\n\nclass ProxyViewState(\n    val config: ProxyViewConfig,\n    val proxy: Proxy,\n    private val parent: ProxyState,\n    private val link: ProxyState?\n) {\n    val paint = Paint()\n    val rect = Rect()\n    val path = Path()\n\n    var title: String = \"\"\n    var subtitle: String = \"\"\n    var delayText: String = \"\"\n    var delayTimeout: Boolean = false\n    var background: Int = config.unselectedBackground\n    var controls: Int = config.unselectedControl\n\n    private var delay: Int = Int.MIN_VALUE  // 使用不可能的值确保第一次 update() 时 delayText 被设置\n    private var selected: Boolean = false\n    /** True when this node is the current one AND was manually selected (show manual icon). */\n    val isManualSelection: Boolean get() = selected \u0026\u0026 parent.nowIsManual\n\n    /** Current selected node name of this group (for UI e.g. scroll-to-current). */\n    val currentGroupNow: String get() = parent.now\n    private var parentNow: String = \"\"\n    private var parentNowIsManual: Boolean = false\n    private var linkNow: String? = null\n\n    private var lastFrameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n\n    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import {\n  closeConnection,\n  getConnections,\n  selectNodeForGroup,\n} from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { markManualProxySelectionStarted } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\nimport { useProfiles } from \"@/hooks/use-profiles\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { syncTrayProxySelection } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\n// 缓存连接清理\nconst cleanupConnections = async (previousProxy: string) =\u003e {\n  try {\n    const { connections } = await getConnections();\n    const cleanupPromises = (connections ?? [])\n      .filter((conn) =\u003e conn.chains.includes(previousProxy))\n      .map((conn) =\u003e closeConnection(conn.id));\n\n    if (cleanupPromises.length \u003e 0) {\n      await Promise.allSettled(cleanupPromises);\n      debugLog(&#96;[ProxySelection] 清理了 ${cleanupPromises.length} 个连接&#96;);\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.warn(\"[ProxySelection] 连接清理失败:\", error);\n  }\n};\n\ninterface ProxySelectionOptions {\n  onSuccess?: () =\u003e void;\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "use crate::{\n    cmd,\n    config::{Config, PrfItem, PrfOption, profiles::profiles_draft_update_item_safe},\n    core::{CoreManager, handle, tray},\n};\nuse anyhow::{Result, bail};\nuse clash_verge_logging::{Type, logging, logging_error};\nuse smartstring::alias::String;\nuse tauri::Emitter as _;\n\n/// Toggle proxy profile\npub async fn toggle_proxy_profile(profile_index: String) {\n    logging_error!(\n        Type::Config,\n        cmd::patch_profiles_config_by_profile_index(profile_index).await\n    );\n}\n\npub async fn switch_proxy_node(group_name: \u0026str, proxy_name: \u0026str) {\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"切换代理成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = handle::Handle::app_handle().emit(\"verge://refresh-proxy-config\", ());\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n            return;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"切换代理失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    match handle::Handle::mihomo()\n        .await\n        .select_node_for_group(group_name, proxy_name)\n        .await\n    {\n        Ok(_) =\u003e {\n            logging!(info, Type::Tray, \"代理切换回退成功: {} -\u003e {}\", group_name, proxy_name);\n            let _ = tray::Tray::global().update_menu().await;\n        }\n        Err(err) =\u003e {\n            logging!(\n                error,\n                Type::Tray,\n                \"代理切换最终失败: {} -\u003e {}, 错误: {:?}\",\n                group_name,\n                proxy_name,\n                err\n            );\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nasync fn should_update_profile",

        "contents": "import {\n  closestCenter,\n  DndContext,\n  DragEndEvent,\n  KeyboardSensor,\n  PointerSensor,\n  useSensor,\n  useSensors,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/core\";\nimport {\n  arrayMove,\n  SortableContext,\n  sortableKeyboardCoordinates,\n  useSortable,\n  verticalListSortingStrategy,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/sortable\";\nimport { CSS } from \"@dnd-kit/utilities\";\nimport {\n  Delete as DeleteIcon,\n  DragIndicator,\n  Link,\n  LinkOff,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  Alert,\n  Box,\n  Button,\n  Chip,\n  IconButton,\n  Paper,\n  Typography,\n  useTheme,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\nimport {\n  closeAllConnections,\n  selectNodeForGroup,\n} from \"tauri-plugin-mihomo-api\";\n\nimport { markManualProxySelectionStarted } from \"@/hooks/use-fallback-switch-notify\";\nimport { useAppData } from \"@/providers/app-data-context\";\nimport { updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime } from \"@/services/cmds\";\nimport { debugLog } from \"@/utils/debug\";\n\ninterface ProxyChainItem {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  type?: string;\n  delay?: number;\n}\n\ninterface ParsedChainConfig {\n  proxies?\n;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyGroups = \nconst handleGroupSelect = \n\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleChangeProxy = useCallback(\n    (group: IProxyGroupItem, proxy: IProxyItem) =\u003e {\n      console.log(\"[UI] handleChangeProxy 被调用\", {\n        isChainMode,\n        组名: group.name,\n        组类型: group.type,\n        节点名: proxy.name,\n        时间戳: Date.now(),\n      });\n      \n      if (isChainMode) {\n        console.log(\"[UI] 链式模式，添加到 chain\");\n        // 使用函数式更新来避免状态延迟问题\n        setProxyChain((prev) =\u003e {\n          // 检查是否已经存在相同名称的代理，防止重复添加\n          if (prev.some((item) =\u003e item.name === proxy.name)) {\n            const warningMessage = t(\"proxies.page.chain.duplicateNode\");\n            setDuplicateWarning({\n              open: true,\n              message: warningMessage,\n            });\n            return prev; // 返回原来的状态，不做任何更改\n          }\n\n          // 安全获取延迟数据，如果没有延迟数据则设为 undefined\n          const delay =\n            proxy.history \u0026\u0026 proxy.history.length \u003e 0\n              ? proxy.history[proxy.history.length - 1].delay\n              : undefined;\n\n          const chainItem: ProxyChainItem = {\n            id: &#96;${proxy.name}_${Date.now()}&#96;,\n            name: proxy.name,\n            type: proxy.type,\n            delay: delay,\n          };\n\n          return [...prev, chainItem];\n        });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const groupTypeLower = group.type?.toLowerCase();\n      console.log(\"[UI] 组类型检查\", {\n        groupTypeLower,\n        \"是否为可切换类型\": [\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower ?? \"\"),\n      });\n      if (\n        !groupTypeLower ||\n        ![\"selector\", \"url-test\", \"fallback\"].includes(groupTypeLower)\n      ) {\n        console.warn(\"[UI] 组类型不支持切换，忽略\", { 组类型: group.type });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      console.log(\"[UI] 调用 handleProxyGroupChange\");\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n\n\n      const doPatchCurrent = async () =\u003e {\n        if (!current || skipConfigSave) {\n          console.log(\"[ProxySelection] 跳过 profile 更新\", {\n            \"current 存在\": !!current,\n            skipConfigSave,\n          });\n          return;\n        }\n        const selected = current.selected ? [...current.selected] : [];\n        const index = selected.findIndex((item) =\u003e item.name === groupName);\n        console.log(\"[ProxySelection] 准备更新 profile\", {\n          \"原 selected\": current.selected ?? [],\n          \"找到索引\": index,\n        });\n        if (index \u003c 0) {\n          selected.push({ name: groupName, now: proxyName });\n        } else {\n          selected[index] = { name: groupName, now: proxyName };\n        }\n        console.log(\"[ProxySelection] 调用 patchCurrent 前\", {\n          \"新 selected\": selected,\n        });\n        await patchCurrent({ selected });\n        console.log(\"[ProxySelection] patchCurrent 完成\", {\n          \"新 selected\": selected,\n        });\n      };\n\n      // 先完成核心切换与 profile 写入，再延迟刷新代理列表，等核心写好 group.now 后再拉取，避免 UI 不更新选中/图钉\n      const delayMs = 400;\n      const delayMs2 = 900;\n      const delayMs3 = 1800;\n      \n      console.log(\"[ProxySelection] 开始三个后端调用\", {\n        \"1_selectNodeForGroup\": &#96;${groupName} -\u003e ${proxyName}&#96;,\n        \"2_patchCurrent\": \"更新 profile.selected\",\n        \"3_syncTray\": \"同步托盘\",\n        \"调用时间\": Date.now(),\n      });\n      \n      Promise.all([\n        selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName)\n\n\n\n\n\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// 获取当前代理节点信息的自定义Hook\nexport const useCurrentProxy = () =\u003e {\n  // 从AppDataProvider获取数据\n  const { proxies, clashConfig, refreshProxy } = useAppData();\n\n  // 获取当前模式\n  const currentMode = clashConfig?.mode?.toLowerCase() || \"rule\";\n\n  // 获取当前代理节点信息\n  const currentProxyInfo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (!proxies) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName: null };\n\n    const { global, groups, records } = proxies;\n\n    // 默认信息\n    let primaryGroupName = \"GLOBAL\";\n    let currentName = global?.now;\n\n    // 在规则模式下，寻找主要代理组（通常是第一个或者名字包含特定关键词的组）\n    if (currentMode === \"rule\" \u0026\u0026 groups.length \u003e 0) {\n      // 查找主要的代理组（优先级：包含关键词 \u003e 第一个非GLOBAL组）\n      const primaryKeywords = [\n        \"auto\",\n        \"select\",\n        \"proxy\",\n        \"节点选择\",\n        \"自动选择\",\n      ];\n      const primaryGroup =\n        groups.find((group: ProxyGroup) =\u003e\n          primaryKeywords.some((keyword) =\u003e\n            group.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword.toLowerCase()),\n          ),\n        ) || groups.filter((g: ProxyGroup) =\u003e g.name !== \"GLOBAL\")[0];\n\n      if (primaryGroup) {\n        primaryGroupName = primaryGroup.name;\n        currentName = primaryGroup.now;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 如果找不到当前节点，返回null\n    if (!currentName) return { currentProxy: null, primaryGroupName };\n\n    // 获取完整的节点信息\n    const currentProxy = records[currentName] || {\n      name: currentName,\n      type: \"Unknown\",\n      udp: false,\n      xudp: false,\n      tfo: false,\n      mptcp: false,\n      smux: false,\n      history: [],\n    };\n\n    return { currentProxy, primaryGroupName };\n  }, [proxies, currentMode]);\n\n  return {\n    currentProxy: currentProxyInfo.currentProxy,\n    primaryGroupName: currentProxyInfo.primaryGroupName,\n    mode: currentMode,\n    refreshProxy,\n  };\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const Widget = styled(Box)(() =\u003e ({\n  padding: \"3px 6px\",\n  fontSize: 14,\n  borderRadius: \"4px\",\n}));\n\nconst TypeBox = styled(\"span\")(({ theme }) =\u003e ({\n  display: \"inline-block\",\n  border: \"1px solid #ccc\",\n  borderColor: alpha(theme.palette.text.secondary, 0.36),\n  color: alpha(theme.palette.text.secondary, 0.42),\n  borderRadius: 4,\n  fontSize: 10,\n  marginRight: \"4px\",\n  padding: \"0 2px\",\n  lineHeight: 1.25,\n}));\n\nexport const ProxyItem = (props: Props) =\u003e {\n  const {\n    group,\n    proxy,\n    selected,\n    showManualIcon = false,\n    showType = true,\n    itemDisplayName,\n    sx,\n    onClick,\n  } = props;\n\n  // 诊断：打印图钉渲染条件\n  if (showManualIcon || selected) {\n    console.log(\"[ProxyItem] 渲染节点\", {\n      组名: group.name,\n      组类型: group.type,\n      节点名: proxy.name,\n      selected,\n      showManualIcon,\n      \"类型包含 fallback\": group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),\n      \"应该显示图钉\": showManualIcon \u0026\u0026 group.type?.toLowerCase()?.includes(\"fallback\"),\n    });\n  }\n\n  const presetList = [\"DIRECT\", \"REJECT\", \"REJECT-DROP\", \"PASS\", \"COMPATIBLE\"];\n  const isPreset = presetList.includes(proxy.name);\n  // -1/\u003c=0 为不显示，-2 为 loading\n  const [delayState, setDelayState] = useReducer(\n    (_: DelayUpdate, next: DelayUpdate) =\u003e next,\n    { delay: -1, updatedAt: 0 },\n  );\n  const timeout = getGroupDelayTimeout(group, showManualIcon);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isPreset) return;\n    delayManager.setListener(proxy.name, group.name, setDelayState);\n\n    return () =\u003e {\n      delayManager.removeListener(proxy.name, group.name);\n    };\n  }, [proxy.name, group.name, isPreset]);\n\n  const updateDelay = useCallback\n;\n;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "func (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {\n\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)\n\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout\n\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {\n\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000\n\t}\n\n\t// 手动选择模式：无条件返回用户选择的节点\n\t// 健康检测由 Set() 的异步 goroutine 负责，这里不阻止用户的选择\n\tif len(f.selected) \u003e 0 {\n\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {\n\t\t\t\treturn proxy // 直接返回，不检查延迟或健康状态\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\t// 选择的节点不存在于列表中（可能被移除），清空选择\n\t\tf.selected = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\t// 自动模式：返回第一个可用的节点\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout\n\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {\n\t\t\treturn proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first\n\tvar best C.Proxy\n\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)\n\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {\n\t\td := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl)\n\t\tif d \u003c minDelay {\n\t\t\tminDelay = d\n\t\t\tbest = proxy\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif best != nil {\n\t\treturn best\n\t}\n\treturn proxies[0]\n}\n\nfunc (f *Fallback) Set(name string) error",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "import {\n  ExpandLessRounded,\n  ExpandMoreRounded,\n  InboxRounded,\n} from \"@mui/icons-material\";\nimport {\n  alpha,\n  Box,\n  ListItemText,\n  ListItemButton,\n  Typography,\n  styled,\n  Chip,\n  Tooltip,\n} from \"@mui/material\";\nimport { useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useTranslation } from \"react-i18next\";\n\nimport { useIconCache } from \"@/hooks/use-icon-cache\";\nimport { useVerge } from \"@/hooks/use-verge\";\nimport { useThemeMode } from \"@/services/states\";\n\nimport { ProxyHead } from \"./proxy-head\";\nimport { ProxyItem } from \"./proxy-item\";\nimport { ProxyItemMini } from \"./proxy-item-mini\";\nimport { HeadState } from \"./use-head-state\";\nimport type { IRenderItem } from \"./use-render-list\";\n\ninterface RenderProps {\n  item: IRenderItem;\n  indent: boolean;\n  isChainMode?: boolean;\n  onLocation: (group: IRenderItem[\"group\"]) =\u003e void;\n  onCheckAll: (groupName: string) =\u003e void;\n  onHeadState: (groupName: string, patch: Partial\u003cHeadState\u003e) =\u003e void;\n  onChangeProxy: (\n    group: IRenderItem[\"group\"],\n    proxy: IRenderItem[\"proxy\"] \u0026 { name: string },\n  ) =\u003e void;\n  /** 当前使用的节点名（用于高亮） */\n  getSelectedForGroup?: (groupName: string) =\u003e string | undefined;\n  /** 组头显示的「当前节点」文案；当 now 为子分组时会解析为「子分组名 (实际节点)」 */\n  getDisplayNowForGroup?: (group: {\n    name: string;\n    now?: string | null;\n  }) =\u003e string;\n  /** 仅当返回值等于节点名时显示「手动选择」图标（Selector/URLTest/Fallback 组） */\n  getManualSelectionForGroup?: (groupName: string) =\u003e string | undefined;\n}\n\nexport const ProxyRender = (props: RenderProps) =\u003e\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const useProxySelection = \nconst changeProxy = \nasync (\n      groupName: string,\n      proxyName: string,\n      previousProxy?: string,\n      skipConfigSave: boolean = false,\n    ) =\u003e {\n\n\n      });\n      \n      Promise.all([\n        selectNodeForGroup(groupName, proxyName).then((result) =\u003e {\n          console.log(\"=== [核心切换] selectNodeForGroup 调用完成 ===\", {\n            组名: groupName,\n            节点名: proxyName,\n            \"返回值\": result,\n            \"返回值类型\": typeof result,\n            \"调用成功\": true,\n            时间戳: Date.now(),\n          });\n          // 立即刷新一次，确认核心是否更新了 now\n          console.log(\"[核心切换] 立即刷新代理数据，验证核心是否更新\");\n          setTimeout(() =\u003e onSuccess?.(), 50);\n          return result;\n        }).catch((err) =\u003e {\n          console.error(\"=== [核心切换] selectNodeForGroup 调用失败 ===\", {\n            组名: groupName,\n            节点名: proxyName,\n            错误: err,\n            \"错误信息\": err?.message || String(err),\n            \"错误堆栈\": err?.stack,\n            调用失败: true,\n            时间戳: Date.now(),\n          });\n          throw err;\n        }),\n        doPatchCurrent().catch((err) =\u003e {\n          console.error(\"[ProxySelection] doPatchCurrent 失败\", err);\n          throw err;\n        }),\n        syncTrayProxySelection().catch((err) =\u003e {\n          console.warn(\"[ProxySelection] syncTray 失败（非关键）\", err);\n        }),\n      ])\n        .then(() =\u003e {\n          debugLog(\n            &#96;\n\n        }\n\n    }\n;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyChain = \nconst handleConnect = async () =\u003e {\n {\n      setIsConnecting(true);\n      try {\n        await updateProxyChainConfigInRuntime(null);\n\n        const targetGroup =\n          mode === \"global\"\n            ? \"GLOBAL\"\n            : selectedGroup || localStorage.getItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n\n        if (targetGroup) {\n          markManualProxySelectionStarted();\n          try {\n            await selectNodeForGroup(targetGroup, \"DIRECT\");\n          } catch {\n            if (proxyChain.length \u003e= 1) {\n              try {\n                await selectNodeForGroup(targetGroup, proxyChain[0].name);\n              } catch {\n                // ignore\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-group\");\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-exit-node\");\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"proxy-chain-items\");\n\n        await closeAllConnections();\n        await refreshProxy();\n\n        onUpdateChain([]);\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"Failed to disconnect from proxy chain:\", error);\n        alert(t(\"proxies.page.chain.disconnectFailed\") || \"断开链式代理失败\");\n      } finally {\n        setIsConnecting(false);\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (proxyChain.length \u003c 2) {\n      alert(t(\"proxies.page.chain.minimumNodes\") || \"链式代理至少需要2个节点\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsConnecting(true);\n    try {\n      // 第一步：保存链式代理配置\n      const chainProxies = proxyChain.map((node) =\u003e node.name);\n  }\n;\n;",

        "contents": "export const ProxyRender = \n\n\n  if (type === 2) {\n    const selectedName = getSelectedForGroup?.(group.name);\n    const manualName = getManualSelectionForGroup?.(group.name);\n    const name = proxy?.name ?? \"\";\n    return (\n      \u003cProxyItem\n        group={group}\n        proxy={proxy!}\n        selected={selectedName != null ? selectedName === name : false}\n        showManualIcon={manualName != null \u0026\u0026 manualName === name}\n        showType={headState?.showType}\n        sx={{ py: 0, pl: 2 }}\n        onClick={() =\u003e onChangeProxy(group, proxy!)}\n      /\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (type === 3) {\n    return (\n      \u003cBox\n        sx={{\n          py: 2,\n          pl: 0,\n          display: \"flex\",\n          flexDirection: \"column\",\n          alignItems: \"center\",\n          justifyContent: \"center\",\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        \u003cInboxRounded sx={{ fontSize: \"2.5em\", color: \"inherit\" }} /\u003e\n        \u003cTypography sx={{ color: \"inherit\" }}\u003eNo Proxies\u003c/Typography\u003e\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (type === 4) {\n    return (\n      \u003cBox\n        sx={{\n          height: 56,\n          display: \"grid\",\n          gap: 1,\n          pl: 2,\n          pr: 2,\n          pb: 1,\n          gridTemplateColumns: &#96;repeat(${item.col! || 2}, 1fr)&#96;,\n        }}\n      \u003e\n        {proxyColItemsMemo}\n      \u003c/Box\u003e\n    );\n  }\n\n  return null;\n};\n\nconst StyledPrimary = styled(\"span\")&#96;\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const ProxyRender = (props: RenderProps) =\u003e {\n  const { t } = useTranslation();\n  const {\n    indent,\n    item,\n    onLocation,\n    onCheckAll,\n    onHeadState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getDisplayNowForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n    isChainMode: _ = false,\n  } = props;\n  const { type, group, headState, proxy, proxyCol } = item;\n  const { verge } = useVerge();\n  const enable_group_icon = verge?.enable_group_icon ?? true;\n  const mode = useThemeMode();\n  const isDark = mode === \"light\" ? false : true;\n  const itembackgroundcolor = isDark ? \"#282A36\" : \"#ffffff\";\n  const iconCachePath = useIconCache({\n    icon: group.icon,\n    cacheKey: group.name.replaceAll(\" \", \"\"),\n    enabled: enable_group_icon,\n  });\n\n  const proxyColItemsMemo = useMemo(() =\u003e {\n    if (type !== 4 || !proxyCol) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    const selectedName = getSelectedForGroup?.(group.name);\n    const manualName = getManualSelectionForGroup?.(group.name);\n    return proxyCol.map((proxyItem) =\u003e {\n      const name = proxyItem?.name ?? \"unknown\";\n      return (\n        \u003cProxyItemMini\n          key={&#96;${item.key}-${name}&#96;}\n          group={group}\n          proxy={proxyItem!}\n          selected={selectedName != null ? selectedName === name : false}\n          showManualIcon={manualName != null \u0026\u0026 manualName === name}\n          showType={headState?.showType}\n          onClick={() =\u003e onChangeProxy(group, proxyItem!)}\n        /\u003e\n      );\n    });\n  }, [\n    type,\n    proxyCol,\n    item.key,\n    group,\n    headState,\n    onChangeProxy,\n    getSelectedForGroup,\n    getManualSelectionForGroup,\n  ]);\n\n  if (type === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cListItemButton\n        dense\n;",

        "contents": "    fun update(snap: Boolean): Boolean {\n        val frameTime = System.currentTimeMillis()\n        var invalidate = false\n\n        if (proxy.type.group) {\n            title = proxy.name\n\n            if (link == null) {\n                subtitle = proxy.type.name\n            } else {\n                if (linkNow !== link.now) {\n                    linkNow = link.now\n\n                    subtitle = \"%s(%s)\".format(\n                        proxy.type.name,\n                        link.now.ifEmpty { \"*\" }\n                    )\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            title = proxy.title\n            subtitle = proxy.subtitle\n        }\n\n        if (delay != proxy.delay) {\n            delay = proxy.delay\n            if (proxy.delay in 0..Short.MAX_VALUE) {\n                delayText = proxy.delay.toString()\n                delayTimeout = false\n            } else {\n                delayText = \"T\"\n                delayTimeout = true\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (parentNow !== parent.now || parentNowIsManual != parent.nowIsManual) {\n            parentNow = parent.now\n            parentNowIsManual = parent.nowIsManual\n            // 始终高亮 core 的「当前节点」；仅当该节点为手动选择时显示手动标志\n            selected = proxy.name == parent.now\n        }\n\n        controls = if (selected) config.selectedControl else config.unselectedControl\n\n        if (snap) {\n            background = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground\n        } else {\n            val target = if (selected) config.selectedBackground else config.unselectedBackground",
